commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
And after the second veil, or partition, was the second or inward part, or that part called the holy of holies. (Witham)
The first veil was at the entrance of the holy place, and separated it from the outward court; the second veil separated the holy place from the holy of holies.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: And after the second veil (There was then not one veil [only], but there was a veil without also) the tabernacle, which is called holy of holies. Observe how everywhere he calls it a tabernacle in regard of [God's] encamping there.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
